name: Fettucine with Tomato Basil Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine basil, garlic, pine nuts, and tomatoes in a food processor.
Process until chunky.
2. Add olive oil and cheese; combine together.
Season well with salt and pepper.
3. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Cook the fettuccine until al dente.
Drain and toss with pesto sauce.
4. Serve extra Parmesan cheese on the side.
Serves 6.
